title: February 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}
'''February 5''' is the 36th day of the year. There are 329 days remaining (330 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1900s#1901|1901]] – [[Marjorie Eaton]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Robin Sachs]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Tim Meadows]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 2]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 58|''Star Wars Insider'' 58]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Ambush]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Grievous Attacks!]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Jedi Activity Cards]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Bombad Jedi]]'' published.
*2009 – "[[Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji]]" published.
*2009 – ''[[The Gem of Alderaan]]'' eighth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Voyage of Temptation]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Stuart Freeborn]] dies.
*[[2014]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 5 (2014)|''The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 5'']] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 1|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 1]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Insider 195|''Star Wars Insider'' 195]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Explosives, Heavy Weapons, and Power Sources]]'' published in [[Wikipedia:French language|French]].
*2021 – The [[Star Wars: Battlefront II (Original Video Game Soundtrack)|soundtrack]] for ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' released.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 1|''Legacy of Vader'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
